name: Skillet Corn
recipeIngredient: 8 large ears of corn, kernels cut off the cob (~5-7 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat an ovenproof cast iron skillet in a 425°F oven.
2. After 20 minutes, pour in the oil.
3. Meanwhile, stir together all the other ingredients.
4. Scrape the mixture into the heated pan and spread it into an even layer without stirring.
5. Bake until a nice crust forms on the bottom and the top starts to brown, about 1 hour.
6. Remove from heat and invert onto a serving plate.
7. Cut into wedges (it will be a bit crumbly, so serve with a spatula).
